pages.text: This section covers some configuration for displaying the shopping list overlay.

pages.title: Size and Position
pages.text: These values will determine where the overlay is positioned on the screen, and how big it will be.$(br2)Note that a negative value for X or Y will cause the overlay to be positioned relative to the right or bottom edge of the screen.

pages.title: Visibility
pages.text: This value determines whether the overlay will appear on the screen if it is empty.
